trickyParts: Workers without repo field (legacy workspace-only dispatches) go to _unknown group with issue number 0. The issueNumber field is optional on WorkerEntry so many workers share key '0' under their repo. Title cache only populates after POST /state/collect or /state/fetch-and-collect runs with GitHub backend data.
deviations: Issue title fetch uses cached titles from state collection rather than live GitHub API calls per dashboard request - this ensures <2s response time for 84 workers. Titles are null until first state collection runs.
openQuestions: Activity data from getSessionStatus makes N HTTP calls to the shared serve per dashboard request. With 84 workers this completed in 36ms with mock adapter. Real serve performance depends on concurrent session query handling.
